questions.question_text: CO mapping 1 What is Natural Language Processing and explain its real-world applications. 2 How does a GRU differ from LSTM ? 3 What are the main differences between few-shot learning and zero-shot learning? 4 What is a Knowledge Graph, and how is it typically structured?

subparts.text: What is a Multilayer Perceptron ? What are the key components of an MLP architecture?
Explain the role of stemming and lemmatization in the NLP preprocessing pipeline?

questions.question_text: What are word embeddings, and how do they capture semantic relationships between words? Compare different word embedding techniques.

subparts.text: Explain the architecture and working of an RNN and its main limitations.
What is a unigram language model, and how does it estimate the probability of a sentence?
Explain the roles of the encoder and decoder in a Sequence-to-Sequence model architecture.
How is the chain rule of probability used to compute sentence probabilities in SLMs ?
What are the two main pretraining tasks used in BERT?
Explain the application and limitations of ELMo.
What is sequence classification in NLP? Explain with examples
What type of neural network architecture does ELMo use to generate embeddings? Explain in detail.
What is the role of context searching in Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems?
What distinguishes white-box knowledge distillation from traditional approaches? Explain.
How does prompt tuning differ from prefix tuning in its implementation?
Explain the structured difference of Graph Neural Networks and Neural Knowledge Graph Inference.
